title: Superior 10-Pack Aluminium Foil Trays with Paper Lids, Heavy Duty Aluminium Takeaway Containers, Freezer & Oven Safe Tin Foil Trays For Baking, Cooking, Broiling, Storage Containers, 9 x 9 inch
features: Sturdy Aluminium Foil Containers: These large tin foil trays measure 24x24x4.5 cm to hold large quantities of your food. They are made of durable aluminum and feature a sturdy grip to facilitate handling and maintain their shape.

Practical For Easy Transportation: all our foil food containers keep your food warm for longer and prevent unpleasant drops and spilling accidents while carrying your delicacies to a friend or an outdoor event.

Oven & Freezer Safe Food Container: our foil containers can withstand up to 500 degrees Fahrenheit, distributing heat evenly to help you master any meal. The containers are also freezer-safe, so you can easily store and preserve your food.
One Container, 100+1 Uses: our versatile trays can serve as baking trays for ovens, broiling trays, cooking trays, and freezer food containers, helping you tackle your kitchen chores with less fuss.

Eco-Friendly Disposable Foil Tins: unlike other disposable storage containers, our square foil trays are made of eco-friendly disposable aluminum to simplify your cooking without hurting the environment.
